## Meeting Purpose

[Sapphire Ventures team meeting with GrowthX to discuss their AI-powered content marketing service and potential investment opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an AI-augmented content marketing service, combining expert human oversight with AI tools to create high-quality, personalized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [The company has achieved $11M in run rate with 72% gross margins and 120% NRR, without significant sales/marketing investment](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [GrowthX differentiates by focusing on outcomes and expert-guided execution, rather than just providing tools or generic agency services](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [The market opportunity is large ($500B service market) but noisy, with many companies making unsubstantiated claims about AI-driven visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Value Proposition

  - [Combines AI tools with human expertise to deliver high-quality, personalized content marketing at scale](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Focus on outcomes rather than just providing tools or generic agency services](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint followed by 12-month contracts, $180K average ACV](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Addresses pain points of overwhelmed marketing teams and ineffective agencies](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Claims to deliver 10x output of traditional methods at 50% lower cost](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Market Opportunity and Competitive Landscape

  - [Targeting $500B marketing services market](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Main competition is "noise" from visibility tools making unsubstantiated claims](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Less concerned about pure AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT) or traditional agencies](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)
  - [Developing "CheckThat.ai" to compete in AI visibility space](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3874.0)

### Technology and Platform

  - [Custom-built AI workflows and agents for content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Integration with client CMSs (e.g., Webflow, WordPress) and analytics tools](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=2345.0)
  - [Developing expert marketplace to scale capacity](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3101.0)

### Financial Performance and Metrics

  - [$11M run rate, 72% gross margins in Q3 2023](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3222.0)
  - [120% net revenue retention (NRR)](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3368.0)
  - [69 customers, low churn after initial 8-week sprint](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3357.0)
  - [Burning $237K/month in August while adding $1M+ in new business](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3839.0)

### Team and Expertise

  - [Founders with extensive marketing and engineering backgrounds](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [High-caliber team including ex-TechCrunch editor, former HashiCorp and Airbnb engineers](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### Challenges and Future Plans

  - [Scaling capacity to meet demand](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
  - [Investing in go-to-market and platform development](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3779.0)
  - [Launching CheckThat.ai to compete in AI visibility space](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3864.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide more detailed financial data, including exact churn numbers](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3361.0)
  - [Sapphire Ventures to review full data room and consider investment opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3292.0)
  - [Potential follow-up discussions on platform evolution and go-to-market strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3214.0)
  - [GrowthX to launch CheckThat.ai and expand marketing efforts to "own the airwaves"](https://fathom.video/share/yTsj2WUYzQxBmf228ELCacVeACtL5f_E?tab=summary&timestamp=3874.0)
